report_name: German Defense Firm Atlas Elektronik Breached by 'TheGentlemen' Group

threat_actors.name: TheGentlemen
threat_actors.description: A threat actor group that claimed responsibility for the breach of Atlas Elektronik GmbH on June 26, 2026. The group's tactic of publicly naming victims on a leak site is common among data extortion groups to pressure victims into paying a ransom.

tools.name: 7-Zip
tools.description: Command-line archiving tool suggested for hunting intrusions similar to the one against Atlas Elektronik. It is used to create large, password-protected archives for staging data prior to exfiltration.

identities.name: Atlas Elektronik GmbH
identities.description: A German provider of defense and maritime technology, including sonars, sensors, and command & control systems for naval applications. Listed as a victim by the 'TheGentlemen' threat group.

indicators.name: 7-Zip Command-Line Archiving For Staging
indicators.pattern:
title: 7-Zip Command-Line Archiving For Staging
id: 4e9d3c2a-1b0f-4d5a-9a8b-7c6d5e4f3a2b
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of 7-Zip via command line to create password-protected archives, a common technique for staging data prior to exfiltration.
references:
  - https://www.breachsense.com/breaches/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-27
tags:
  - attack.t1560.001
level: medium
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\7z.exe'
      - '\7za.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - ' a '
      - '-p'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the use of command-line archiving tools like 7-Zip to create large, password-protected archives, a common TTP for staging data before exfiltration, as suggested in the hunting hints for the Atlas Elektronik breach.
